description: SQL migrations analysis and shared directory structure

nodes.label: 001_init_tables.sql
nodes.summary: Core tables: dealers, beneficiaries, stock_allocations, transactions. Foundation for FPS shop owners, ration card holders, stock allocation tracking, and ration distribution transactions.

nodes.label: 002_add_sessions.sql
nodes.summary: Adds sessions table for dealer auth sessions with refresh token hashing, user-agent, IP tracking, and expiry.

nodes.label: 003_add_otp.sql
nodes.summary: Adds otp_requests table for OTP-based authentication with mobile, OTP hash, purpose, attempt tracking and expiry.

nodes.label: 004_add_audit_log.sql
nodes.summary: Adds audit_logs table (BIGSERIAL PK) for tracking dealer actions with old/new JSONB data snapshots, IP, user-agent.

nodes.label: 005_add_notifications.sql
nodes.summary: Adds notifications table for in-app dealer notifications with title, body, type, read status.

nodes.label: 006_inventory_movements.sql
nodes.summary: Adds inventory_movements table tracking stock changes by movement type (receipt/sale/damage) per commodity.

nodes.label: 007_add_commissions.sql
nodes.summary: Adds commission_rates (per-commodity rate table), commissions (monthly commission calc per dealer), bank_settlements (payment tracking with TDS).

nodes.label: 008_add_finance.sql
nodes.summary: Adds income_entries and expense_entries tables for dealer financial tracking (Component 16).

nodes.label: 009_add_ads.sql
nodes.summary: Adds dealer_ads table for dealer promotion/announcement engine with scheduling and active status.

nodes.label: 010_add_mdm.sql
nodes.summary: Adds schools and mdm_distributions tables for MDM/ICDS school nutrition reporting (Component 12).

nodes.label: 011_add_sync_logs.sql
nodes.summary: Adds sync_logs (govt sync tracking with direction/status/payload) and dealer_bank_info tables.

nodes.label: 012_add_social_audit.sql
nodes.summary: Adds audit_findings table for compliance/fraud detection with severity levels and evidence JSONB.

nodes.label: 013_add_missing_tables.sql
nodes.summary: Adds lifting_records, policy_schemes, icds_codes, social_audit_meetings, gujarat_directory tables.

nodes.label: 014_add_views.sql
nodes.summary: Creates 8 analytical views: vw_dealer_stock_summary, vw_pending_beneficiaries, vw_commodity_sales_trend, vw_commission_finance_summary, vw_lifting_stock_mapping, vw_sync_status, vw_audit_findings_summary, vw_monthly_report, vw_directory_stats.

nodes.label: 015_add_govt_sync_enhancements.sql
nodes.summary: Extends beneficiaries with govt fields (aadhaar, address, NFSA category, sync metadata). Adds govt_beneficiary_imports, govt_change_log, sync_scheduler_config, sync_import_batches tables.

nodes.label: 016_add_gujarat_hierarchy.sql
nodes.summary: Adds ltree extension and gujarat_region_hierarchy (state→district→taluka→ward→fps_area), gujarat_aggregate_stats (monthly NFSA/non-NFSA stats), gujarat_csv_imports. Links dealers/beneficiaries to regions. Creates vw_gujarat_hierarchy_rollup recursive view and grand-total trigger.

nodes.label: 017_add_dealer_credentials.sql
nodes.summary: Adds dealer_credentials (encrypted govt portal creds with AES-256-GCM), dealer_bank_info, sync_scheduler_config, sync_import_batches, govt_beneficiary_imports, govt_change_log. Adds sync_enabled/last_sync_at to dealers.

nodes.label: 018_add_sync_jobs.sql
nodes.summary: Adds sync_jobs table for tracking scheduled/manual sync runs per dealer with status and records_synced.

nodes.label: 019_add_composite_indexes.sql
nodes.summary: Adds composite indexes on (dealer_id, month, commodity) for stock_allocations and transactions. Drops redundant old indexes.

nodes.label: 020_add_mdm_monthly_records.sql
nodes.summary: Adds mdm_monthly_records table with JSONB records for monthly MDM data aggregation per dealer.

nodes.label: 021_add_dealer_credential_iv_password.sql
nodes.summary: Adds iv_efps_password and auth_tag_efps_password columns to dealer_credentials for per-field AES-256-GCM IV storage.

nodes.label: 022_add_sync_scheduler_source_url.sql
nodes.summary: Adds source_url column to sync_scheduler_config for government CSV download URL.

nodes.label: 023_add_tds_rates.sql
nodes.summary: Adds tds_rates table (per-commodity, time-variant TDS percentages) replacing hardcoded 10%. Seeds defaults for Rice/Wheat/Sugar/Kerosene/Oil/Pulses.

nodes.label: 024_add_on_delete_cascade.sql
nodes.summary: Adds ON DELETE CASCADE to all dealer_id foreign keys across 14 tables. Adds ON DELETE SET NULL for transactions.beneficiary_id.

nodes.label: 025_add_updated_at_trigger.sql
nodes.summary: Creates update_updated_at_column() trigger function. Auto-applies BEFORE UPDATE triggers to all public tables with updated_at column.

nodes.label: 026_enterprise_sync_infrastructure.sql
nodes.summary: Enterprise sync: enhances sync_jobs (priority, mode, trace_id, quarantine), adds sync_quarantine, system_events, service_tokens tables. Adds columns to sync_scheduler_config. Adds source_synced_at/sync_job_id/version to 4 core tables.

nodes.label: 027_auth_refresh_optimization.sql
nodes.summary: Adds indexes on sessions for refresh_token_hash and expires_at for faster token lookup and cleanup.

nodes.label: 028_add_commission_payments.sql
nodes.summary: Adds amount_paid and deposit_date columns to commissions for actual bank payment recording.

nodes.label: 029_add_sync_columns.sql
nodes.summary: Adds sync columns to beneficiaries (external_id, beneficiary_name, father_name, etc.), transactions (transaction_hash, ration_card_no, etc.), stock_allocations (allocated_quantity, lifted_quantity, etc.), lifting_records (allocated_quantity, lifted_quantity, etc.) with unique constraints.

nodes.label: 030_create_stock_entry_system.sql
nodes.summary: Adds stock_entries (govt/received/damaged quantities with generated columns) and allocations (beneficiary-level allocation tracking with generated remaining_quantity) tables.

nodes.label: 031_enterprise_erp_redesign.sql
nodes.summary: Enterprise ERP redesign: Adds transaction_source enum (EXCEL_SYNC/MANUAL_CBDC/OFFLINE), inventory_department enum (REGULAR_FPS/MDM/ICDS). Creates items, stock_ledger, stock_ledger_movements, transaction_line_items, financial_ledger tables. Adds 3 triggers for auto-posting. Creates vw_stock_ledger_rolling and vw_financial_summary views. Migrates existing inventory_movements data.
